notableEvents.label: Blake Dunn walk-off

notableEvents.label: Iván Herrera GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Iván Herrera grounds into a double play, shortstop Elly De La Cruz to second baseman Matt McLain to first baseman Nathaniel Lowe. JJ Wetherholt out at 2nd. Iván Herrera out at 1st.
